notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.
